artifacts.summary: Audit of 'D=CanonicalMCS' notation: identifies categorical error conflating FMCS indexing parameter with TaskFrame temporal domain, documents 80+ occurrences, provides correction patterns

Analyzes why FMCS CanonicalMCS exists: legitimate but degenerate construction for trivializing F/P witnesses in TruthLemma proof; identity mapping mcs(w)=w.world; serves proof-theoretic purpose but cannot connect to TaskFrame semantics
